title: Colfert Essential N
content: A highly concentrated liquid nitrogen formulation containing three nitrogen forms: Nitric, Ammonium, and Ureic to ensure balanced nutrition and sustained growth. Plants absorb nitrogen primarily as Nitrate NO<sub>3</sub><sup>?</sup> and Ammonium NH<sub>4</sub><sup>+</sup> ions, while Urea converts to NO<sub>3</sub><sup>-</sup>  after hydrolysis, ensuring continuous nitrogen availability.
key_benefits: Suitable for foliar spraying and fertigation during vegetative growth to enhance vigor and leaf expansion.
